latest_trading_day_note: 2026-07-04 is Saturday, so 2026-07-03 is used as the latest trading day.
data_sources: Eastmoney public market endpoints for industry ranking and constituent snapshots
Tushare MCP daily bars for selected and alternative stock verification
Fuyao API was acknowledged as a possible supplemental source; the key was not persisted to files

final_watchlist.name: 风语筑
final_watchlist.selection_reason: Strongest industry exposure, positive net inflow, acceptable valuation versus other theme candidates.
final_watchlist.status: Watch after limit-up; wait for turnover and pullback confirmation.

final_watchlist.name: 埃斯顿
final_watchlist.selection_reason: Robotics core candidate with strong interval momentum and large positive net inflow.
final_watchlist.status: Core momentum name; avoid chasing and wait for post-divergence support.

final_watchlist.name: 雷赛智能
final_watchlist.selection_reason: Strong robotics motion-control exposure with high but less extreme valuation than several alternatives.
final_watchlist.status: Trend candidate; watch pullback that holds the short-term platform.

final_watchlist.name: 信捷电气
final_watchlist.selection_reason: Automation-control candidate with less extreme one-day crowding and more moderate PE.
final_watchlist.status: Relatively balanced watchlist member; monitor follow-through and industry beta.

final_watchlist.name: 拓斯达
final_watchlist.selection_reason: High-beta robotics and smart-manufacturing candidate with strong interval momentum and high liquidity.
final_watchlist.status: High-volatility candidate; wait for second confirmation and use strict risk control.

excluded_or_backup.name: 绿的谐波
excluded_or_backup.reason: Very strong but PE around 685 and 2026-07-03 single-day gain around 18.15%; treated as a sector barometer.

excluded_or_backup.name: 瑞松科技
excluded_or_backup.reason: Strong interval return but PE around 199 and snapshot net outflow around 0.61 billion yuan.

excluded_or_backup.name: 博实股份
excluded_or_backup.reason: Valuation is reasonable, but the 2026-04-01 to 2026-07-03 return was only about 2.0%, weaker than the final momentum names.

excluded_or_backup.name: 机器人
excluded_or_backup.reason: High thematic recognition and liquidity, but negative PE and weaker earnings visibility.

excluded_or_backup.name: 凡拓数创
excluded_or_backup.reason: Belongs to the strongest digital-media industry, but PE is negative and snapshot net flow was negative.
